metadata.name: Redeem Miles for a Cabin Upgrade

description: A frequent flyer member wants to use their miles to upgrade from Economy to Business Class on an existing booking.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the member's booking and their frequent flyer account details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the booking and confirms the member's mileage balance.

nodes.task_description: Check if upgrade seats are available on the flight and inform the member of the mileage cost.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms upgrade availability and the required number of miles.

nodes.task_description: Process the upgrade by deducting the miles from the member's account and re-issuing the ticket in the higher class.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully processes the upgrade and issues the new ticket.
